reviews.comment:
Los baños son un asco, no hay mantenimiento, la que atiende en el full trata a los clientes de muy mala forma, no dan ganas de volver a comprar.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are disgusting, there's no maintenance, and the person who works at the store treats customers very poorly. They don't make you want to buy again.
